description: Creates a rectangular box centered on XY plane
Creates a cylinder standing up on the Z axis
Creates a hollow tube or ring

code:
# Note: radius1 is bottom, radius2 is top (0 for sharp point)
result = cq.Workplane('XY').circle(radius1).workplane(offset=height).circle(radius2).loft(combine=True)

description: Cuts a circular hole through the selected face (usually Top >Z)
code:
# Assumes 'result' is selected. Select face -> draw circle -> cut
result = result.faces('>Z').workplane().circle(hole_radius).cutThruAll()

description: Rounds the edges of the shape
Bevels the edges of the shape
